pr.title: docs(readme): add Codex CLI Notes section
pr.body:
## Summary
- New `## Codex CLI Notes` section in README between Quick Start and What's Inside
- Covers slash-reservation, `$skill-name` invocation, `/skills` verification, natural-language auto-trigger, and the skill directory scan order
- Codex CLI row in Quick Start invocation table now links to the section
- Added to the table of contents

Source for scan-order and invocation: https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills

## Test plan
- [x] Verified scan-order against developers.openai.com/codex/skills
- [x] Verified anchor link from Quick Start table resolves to the new heading
- [ ] Mirror to coograph-website docs/getting-started ships in a separate PR on that repo

Closes #7
pr.author: paullukic
